caption: A person holds a sports card enclosed in a clear plastic protective case, tilting and rotating it to show the card's surface. The card features an athlete's image and a signature. In the background, a man with a beard, wearing a navy blue t-shirt, sits in a room with various equipment, including what appears to be a printer and a desk. The scene is overlaid with a logo and text that reads "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". A stylized graphic of palm trees and a teal circle is visible on the surface below the card. As the sequence progresses, the person's hands adjust the angle of the card, shifting the light reflections on the plastic case and revealing more of the card's details. The man in the background remains seated and stationary throughout the frames.
